name: bokopano
description: Volunteer and work-exchange platform in Africa

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:landing" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev:landing" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install

author: Bokopano Team
